room.caption: [G3-2D] Remember this from the original?
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(15)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh6MainA) //sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA)

var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(302) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
